note: KNOWN BUG: submitting the same email in a different case bypasses the case-sensitive app-level dedup check. The row is stored lowercased (Lead.validate_email), so the DB's UNIQUE constraint DOES still catch the true duplicate — but only after the INSERT is attempted, so the client receives an unhandled 500 Internal Server Error instead of the intended clean 409 Conflict that a same-case resubmission gets.

second_submit_body.detail: An unexpected error occurred. It has been logged.
